name: modo
description: MODO — agência inteligente de presença digital.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=@modo/api & npm run dev --workspace=@modo/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@modo/contracts && npm run build --workspace=@modo/api && npm run build --workspace=@modo/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@modo/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace=@modo/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@modo/web
